Type Property# shouldEndSuppressingHighDynamicRangeContent

macOS 26.0+

```
static var shouldEndSuppressingHighDynamicRangeContent: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSApplication.ShouldEndSuppressingHighDynamicRangeContent> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSApplication.ShouldEndSuppressingHighDynamicRangeContent>`.## [See Also](/documentation/Foundation/NotificationCenter/MessageIdentifier/shouldEndSuppressingHighDynamicRangeContent#see-also)
